brandDescription: Mercedes-Benz is a prestigious German luxury automobile manufacturer renowned for its engineering excellence, sophisticated design, and cutting-edge technology. With a strong presence in the Indian luxury car market, Mercedes-Benz offers a diverse range of sedans, SUVs, and electric vehicles including the A-Class Limousine, C-Class, S-Class, CLA Electric, and G-Class. Each model combines timeless elegance, powerful performance, and innovative features that define the pinnacle of automotive luxury.

models.name: Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine A 200 BSVI
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine is a premium compact sedan that combines sporty design, advanced technology, and luxurious comfort. Powered by a responsive petrol engine, the A-Class delivers an engaging driving experience with exceptional fuel efficiency. Its sophisticated interior, cutting-edge MBUX infotainment system, and comprehensive safety features make it an ideal entry point into the world of Mercedes-Benz luxury.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Seat Comfort package, THERMOTRONIC automatic climate control, Electrically adjustable seats with Memory function, Mercedes me Service app, Cruise control, 4 Driving Modes, 4-way lumbar support, Ambient lighting with 64 colours, Luxury seats, Multifunction sports steering wheel, LED High Performance headlamps, Electronic roller sunblind, Light and Sight package

models.name: Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine A 200d BSVI
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine is a premium compact sedan that combines sporty design, advanced technology, and luxurious comfort. Powered by a refined diesel engine, the A-Class delivers impressive fuel efficiency and a smooth driving experience.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Seat Comfort package, THERMOTRONIC automatic climate control, Electrically adjustable seats with Memory function, Mercedes me Service app, Cruise control, 4 Driving Modes, 4-way lumbar support, Ambient lighting with 64 colours, Luxury seats, Multifunction sports steering wheel, LED High Performance headlamps, Electronic roller sunblind, Light and Sight package

models.name: Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine A 35 4MATIC
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine A 35 4MATIC is the high-performance variant of the compact sedan, combining AMG sportiness with everyday practicality. Powered by a potent turbocharged engine and featuring AMG Performance 4MATIC all-wheel drive, it delivers exhilarating performance and dynamic handling.

specifications.additionalFeatures: SPORTS SEATS WITH SEAT COMFORT PACKAGE, ELECTRICALLY ADJUSTABLE FRONT SEATS WITH MEMORY FUNCTION, VOICE CONTROL SYSTEM, VEHICLE SET-UP, AMG DYNAMIC SELECT, AMBIENT LIGHTING IN 64 COLORS, AMG 5-twin-spoke light-alloy wheels, PANORAMIC SLIDING SUNROOF, MULTIBEAM LED, ALL-DIGITAL INSTRUMENT CLUSTER DISPLAY, Mirror package

models.name: Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine A 200
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz A-Class Limousine is a premium compact sedan that combines sporty design, advanced technology, and luxurious comfort. Powered by a responsive petrol engine, the A-Class delivers an engaging driving experience with exceptional fuel efficiency.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Seat Comfort package, THERMOTRONIC automatic climate control, Electrically adjustable seats with Memory function, Mercedes me Service app, Cruise control, 4 Driving Modes, 4-way lumbar support, Ambient lighting with 64 colours, Luxury seats, Multifunction sports steering wheel, LED High Performance headlamps, Electronic roller sunblind, Light and Sight package, 17-inch 5-twin-spoke light-alloy wheels, Mirror package, Panoramic sliding sunroof, Diamond radiator grille, Illuminated door sill panels

models.name: Mercedes-Benz CLA Electric
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz CLA Electric is a stylish electric sedan that combines sporty design, zero-emission driving, and cutting-edge technology. With its sleek coupe-like silhouette, powerful electric motor, and impressive range, the CLA Electric offers a thrilling and sustainable driving experience. The advanced MBUX infotainment system and comprehensive safety features make it a compelling choice in the luxury electric sedan segment.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Fast Charging - 20Min-200 kW-(10-80%), Charging Time AC - 6H 30Min-11 kW-(10-100%), Regenerative Braking, Charging Port - CCS-II, Charging Options - 11 kW AC Wall Box, DC Fast Charger, Charger Type - CCS2 (DC)/Type 2 (AC), Navigation With Live Traffic, Over the Air (OTA) Updates, Heated Seats Front Only, Foldable Rear Seat - 40:20:40 Split

models.name: Mercedes-Benz C-Class C 300
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz C-Class is a premium executive sedan that embodies luxury, performance, and sophistication. Powered by a refined petrol mild-hybrid engine, the C-Class delivers a smooth and responsive driving experience. With its elegant design, luxurious cabin, and advanced technology features, the C-Class sets new benchmarks in the executive sedan segment.

specifications.additionalFeatures: AMG floor mats, AMG Line interior, Multifunction sports steering wheel in nappa leather, AMG brushed stainless steel sports pedals, Ambient lighting, AMG Line exterior, DIGITAL LIGHT, Night package, Burmester 3D surround sound system, MBUX Navigation Premium, Live Traffic Information, Natural Voice Control, Touch Control Concept, Fingerprint Scanner, Vehicle Monitoring, Navigation Connectivity package, Vehicle Set-Up, Mercedes-Benz emergency call system

models.name: Mercedes-Benz C-Class C 220d
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz C-Class is a premium executive sedan that embodies luxury, performance, and sophistication. Powered by a refined diesel engine with mild-hybrid technology, the C-Class delivers impressive fuel efficiency and a smooth driving experience.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Velour Floor Mats, AVANTGARDE interior, Multifunction sports steering wheel, Ambient lighting, Free-standing fully digital instrument display with 12.3 inch LCD colour display, High-resolution central display with 11.9 inch screen, MBUX multimedia system, AVANTGARDE exterior, 17 inch 5-spoke light-alloy wheels, Mirror package, Panoramic sliding sunroof, Windscreen wipers with rain sensor, Burmester 3D surround sound system, MBUX Navigation Premium

models.name: Mercedes-Benz S-Class S 450e
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz S-Class is the epitome of automotive luxury, combining breathtaking design, cutting-edge technology, and unparalleled comfort. Powered by a sophisticated plug-in hybrid powertrain, the S-Class delivers effortless performance with exceptional efficiency.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Burmester 4D High-End Surround Sound System, Rear Touchscreen 13.1 inch, Dolby Atmos, ADAS features (Forward Collision Warning, Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Departure Warning, Lane Keep Assist, Adaptive High Beam Assist), Advance Internet (Over Speeding Alert, Tow Away Alert)

models.name: Mercedes-Benz S-Class S 450e AMG Line
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz S-Class AMG Line is the epitome of automotive luxury with a sporty edge, combining breathtaking design, cutting-edge technology, and unparalleled comfort. The AMG Line adds sporty exterior and interior styling elements for a more dynamic appearance.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Burmester 4D High-End Surround Sound System, Rear Touchscreen 13.1 inch, Dolby Atmos, ADAS features (Forward Collision Warning, Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Departure Warning, Lane Keep Assist, Adaptive High Beam Assist), Advance Internet (Over Speeding Alert, Tow Away Alert)

models.name: Mercedes-Benz G-Class 400d Adventure Edition
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz G-Class is an iconic luxury SUV that combines legendary off-road capability with unparalleled luxury. The 400d Adventure Edition features a powerful diesel engine, rugged exterior enhancements, and a luxurious interior, making it the ultimate vehicle for both urban sophistication and off-road adventures.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Burmester surround sound system, Widescreen cockpit, Multifunction steering wheel in Nappa Leather, air vents in silver chrome, interior elements finished in nappa leather, round headlamps, Roof rack with C profile rails, Removable ladder at the rear with anti-slip coating, Logo projector in the outside mirror, PROFESSIONAL roof luggage rack, Manufaktur Logo Package, PROFESSIONAL Line exterior package, PROFESSIONAL spare wheel holder, 5-spoke light-alloy wheels painted in silver, Full-size spare wheel on tailgate, Door handle with embossed logo

models.name: Mercedes-Benz G-Class 450d Mild Hybrid
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz G-Class is an iconic luxury SUV that combines legendary off-road capability with unparalleled luxury. The 450d Mild Hybrid features a powerful diesel engine with mild-hybrid technology, delivering enhanced efficiency and performance.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Burmester surround sound system, Widescreen cockpit, Ambient lighting in 64 colors, air vents in silver chrome, interior elements finished in nappa leather, round headlamps, multibeam LED headlamps, sporty stainless steel spare wheel cover, Underguard in silver, standard alloy wheels, Sliding sunroof

models.name: Mercedes-Benz G-Class AMG G 63
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz G-Class AMG G 63 is the ultimate high-performance luxury SUV, combining legendary off-road capability with AMG's exhilarating performance. Powered by a handcrafted V8 engine, the G 63 delivers breathtaking power and a distinctive exhaust note, making it the most powerful and dynamic G-Class ever.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Burmester surround sound system, Widescreen cockpit, Ambient lighting in 64 colors, air vents in silver chrome, interior elements finished in nappa leather, round headlamps, multibeam LED headlamps, sporty stainless steel spare wheel cover, Underguard in silver, standard alloy wheels, Sliding sunroof

models.name: Mercedes-Benz G-Class AMG G 63 Collector's Edition
models.description: The Mercedes-Benz G-Class AMG G 63 Collector's Edition is the ultimate expression of G-Class exclusivity and performance. Featuring unique design elements, premium materials, and the powerful V8 engine, this limited edition model represents the pinnacle of luxury off-road motoring.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Burmester surround sound system, Widescreen cockpit, Ambient lighting in 64 colors, air vents in silver chrome, interior elements finished in nappa leather, round headlamps, multibeam LED headlamps, sporty stainless steel spare wheel cover, Underguard in silver, standard alloy wheels, Sliding sunroof, Collector's Edition unique features
